issues.summary: Investigate why tiles with microsite are not pushed to TV
issues.description:
Follow up of task: <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-0">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/AENW-579</custom>   
When setting up creative with 4 tiles, tiles with click actions different that “microsite” are displayed on TV. Tiles with click action “microsite” are not displayed at all. We suspect config of those tiles is not in ad response.

We performed an analysis of changes required on full codebase using Claude Opus 1m (repositories analysed in single context: rtb-trader, rtb-bidder, rtb-delivery, rtb-gateway, data-activation-producer-wrapper). Results in attachment. We need to go through it and validate if reasoning is correct and use it as starting point in user stories creation. This prompt cost was 63USD, better be good <custom data-type="emoji" data-id="id-1">:smile:</custom>   
  
Acceptance criteria:  
\- We know the reason why TV does not gets proper ad response with all tiles and correct click actions on local environment.  
\- Follow up implementation detailed (repository, description) tasks created, added to backlog

issues.summary: [Training] Ruby udemy training - Prepare to 13-17 July
Spike: Investigate ad serving pipeline for Samsung TV+
issues.description:
**Description:**

Investigate and document the ad serving pipeline for Samsung TV+ platform. The current ad response generator supports Samsung TV Native, which requests ads from the bidder. TV+ is a different platform that uses a different mechanism for requesting ads — likely involving delivery directly rather than the bidder.

 **Goal:**

Build a clear understanding of the TV+ ad serving flow and determine what changes are needed in ad response generator to support it.

**Areas to investigate:**

* Systems involved — identify all services/components in the TV+ ad serving chain (delivery, bidder, CDN, any intermediaries)
* Request format — what does the ad request to the server look like (endpoint, parameters, headers)
* Data dependencies — what data needs to exist for a TV+ ad to be served (flights, creatives, targeting, schedules)
* Response format — what is returned (VAST XML, JSON, other) and how it differs from TV Native responses
* Impact on ad response generator — identify which modules/scripts need changes and what new components are required

**Expected output:**

  A document covering:

1. End-to-end request flow for TV+ ad serving
2. List of systems/services involved with their roles
3. **Example request/response (or pointer to where to find one)**
4. Proposed changes to ad response generator — what to add and where

‌

  **Acceptance Criteria:**

* \[ \] TV+ ad serving flow is documented end-to-end (from request trigger to final response)
* \[ \] All involved systems/services are identified with their roles
* \[ \] Request format is documented (endpoint, parameters, headers, example)
* \[ \] Response format is documented with example
* \[ \] Key differences from TV Native pipeline are listed
* \[ \] A list of required changes in ad response generator is provided, specifying:

    * Which existing files/modules need modification
    * What new modules/scripts need to be created
    * What new parameters/arguments are needed (e.g. new CLI flags)
    * What new data dependencies or external services are required
    
* \[ \] Rough effort estimate for implementation is provided
* Jira task to do implementation in ad response generator

issues.summary: [DSP-UI] Add new click action "QR Code Microsite"
issues.description:
As a DSP user on 2022-2026 forms for Masthead experiences i want new click action QR Code Microsite” so that I can use QR Code microsite template without remembering microsite URL

‌

Functional requirements:

1. New option on “Click Action” dropdown - “Shoppable Microsite”
2. When “Shoppable Microsite” is selected a new field Target URL is created.
3. When “Shoppable Microsite” is selected a text field “Target URL” should appear. URL typed here should be url encoded added to “Microsite URL” field as URL query parameter so JS on microsite can read it

Acceptance criteria:

* all functional requirements are implemented correctly

General UI (mock says Click action Shoppable Microsite but actually should be QR Code Microsite):

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=null&id=c5e943b0-d577-44f6-9f3e-618774219816&&collection=&height=262&occurrenceKey=null&width=639&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
After user entered Target URL (mock says Click action Microsite but actually should be QR Code Microsite):

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=null&id=7602003c-d799-4941-9465-d7e81a1a2e11&&collection=&height=269&occurrenceKey=null&width=644&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
‌

Final state after automatically appending url encoded target url (mock says Click action Microsite but actually should be QR Code Microsite)

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=null&id=d61b5b4e-9606-4643-a579-2a478653a4e2&&collection=&height=263&occurrenceKey=null&width=637&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
